channel.title: Epic Poem on
channel.description: Recent content in Epic Poem on

item.title: The Odyssey by Homer Book Summary and Analysis
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Summary of The Odyssey
#

Ir was ritten by Homer, the same poet who wrote The Iliad. It was composed around 8th century BCE in ancient Greece.
It is an epic poem with 24 books (sections), written in dactylic hexameter, Contains over 12,000 lines of poetry.

The Odyssey is about human resilience, wisdom, and the longing for home.

item.title: The Iliad by Homer - Epic Poem Summary
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Summary of The Iliad
#

The Iliad was written by Homer, an ancient Greek poet. The Iliad is a long epic poem written in 24 books (sections). It contains over 15,000 lines of verse in dactylic hexameter (a rhythmic style of poetry). Originally, it was recited or sung by bards before being written down. The Trojan War (c. 1200 BCE) may have happened, but we have no solid proof. Archaeologist Heinrich Schliemann discovered ruins in Troy (modern-day Turkey) in the 19th century, suggesting a war-like event occurred.
